text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Osaka Hai, and Satono
Diamond is calmly preparing for the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she's taken aback when she comes
across Kitasan Black in the paddock. She has a
completely new aura about her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For just a moment, Satono Diamond falters in the
face of Kitasan Black's intensity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She reproaches herself by quietly repeating to
herself that she won't lose, and regains her nerve.
